name: Apple OpenELM (270M–3B)
archDisplay: Dense transformer with layer-wise parameter scaling (270M/450M/1.1B/3B family)
note: Fully open, reproducible 270M/450M/1.1B/3B family with code, training logs, and checkpoints; layer-wise scaling beats OLMo at matched budget.

results.notes: OpenELM-3B (pretrained), ARC-Easy, zero-shot — same 'Zero-Shot Results' table on the official HF model card as the existing ARC-Challenge/HellaSwag/WinoGrande rows.
OpenELM-3B (pretrained), PIQA, zero-shot — same 'Zero-Shot Results' table as the existing three rows.
OpenELM-3B (pretrained), from the HF card's 'LLM360'/'Open LLM Leaderboard' evaluation-harness table (a separate table from the zero-shot one, but same official card and same model).
OpenELM-3B (pretrained), RACE score from the HF card's 'Open LLM Leaderboard' evaluation-harness table; lm-eval-harness's default 'race' task uses the high-school (RACE-H) split.

OpenELM-3B (pretrained), MMLU score from the official HF model card's 'LLM360' / 'Open LLM Leaderboard' evaluation-harness table — same table the existing TruthfulQA (34.98) and RACE-H (38.76) rows were sourced from, but MMLU itself was not yet tracked.

verificationNotes: Confirmed real and unchanged. Fetched huggingface.co/apple/OpenELM and /OpenELM-3B: license tag is literally 'apple-sample-code-license' (matches record), params 270M/450M/1.08B/3.04B confirmed in arXiv 2404.14619 Table 9 (rounds to 3B), training context length 2048 confirmed in same table (matches ctxK=2). All three result rows (HellaSwag 72.44, ARC-Challenge 35.58, WinoGrande 65.51) confirmed to literally appear on the cited HF page.
